author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Spyro: A Realm Beyond – Announcement Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Wishlist Spyro: A Realm Beyond on Nintendo Switch 2 before it arrives in spring 2027: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/spyro-a-realm-beyond-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01  

Take flight on a brand-new journey through a strange and wondrous realm! When Spyro finds himself stranded, his journey to discover a way home is interrupted by the arrival of a vicious invading force known as the Scavs. Carve your path through the skies and chain together dives, climbs, and tight turns as you wing your way through Spyro’s boldest evolution yet. Can you make new allies and rise to protect this realm before it’s changed forever? 

#NintendoSwitch2 #Spyro #ARealmBeyond 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

Follow Nintendo of America
X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAmerica
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/nintendo

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Minecraft Dungeons II – Pre-order Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Minecraft Dungeons II arrives September 29, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch! Pre-order and get 2 hero skins, the Twisted cape, and the Twisted chicken pet: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/minecraft-dungeons-ii-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

Drop the pickaxe, grab a sword, and charge into a new adventure brimming with high‑stakes encounters, thrilling challenges, and never‑before‑seen locations! Will you and your allies prevail against the forces of evil and save the day once more? 

#NintendoSwitch2 #NintendoSwitch #DungeonsII 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Demi and the Fractured Dream – Gameplay Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Demi and the Fractured Dream comes to Nintendo Switch 2 in February 2027!  

In this enchanting action-adventure, you play as Demi, a Voidsent able to harness the powers of the void. Though the void curse eats away at you, it also empowers you. Guided by a mysterious voice that whispers from beyond, you must travel the realms, from the wind-swept spires of the Desert Kingdom to the spiritual waters of the Marsh Kingdom, to stave off a world-ending awakening.  

Using your wide arsenal of attacks, spells, and tools, tackle dungeons filled with environmental puzzles, vanquish void monsters, and defeat the three Accursed Beasts of legend.  

As your story unfolds, what will you unveil about your own role in this world? 

#NintendoSwitch2 #DemiandtheFracturedDream 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica
